headlines.title: Trump says Iran deal and opening of Strait of Hormuz are 'largely negotiated'
headlines.summary: US President Donald Trump reports significant progress in Iran negotiations, with details emerging of a potential deal that could extend the current ceasefire for up to 60 days and open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Suspect killed after opening fire near White House security checkpoint
headlines.summary: A suspect approached a checkpoint near the White House and opened fire; the suspect was killed by Secret Service and a bystander was wounded in the incident.

headlines.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
headlines.summary: Russia confirmed using the Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, in a large-scale attack on Ukraine.

headlines.title: Iran executes person for charges related to sending information to US and Israel
headlines.summary: The Iranian judiciary's Mizan news agency reported the execution of one person on charges of sending information to the US and Israel during the war.

headlines.title: California declares emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
headlines.summary: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.

headlines.title: China's worst mining disaster in over a decade kills at least 82
headlines.summary: A gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China has become the country's worst mining disaster in more than a decade.

headlines.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
headlines.summary: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.

headlines.title: Turkish riot police evict ousted opposition leadership from party headquarters
headlines.summary: Turkish riot police fired tear gas and broke through the gates of the main opposition party's headquarters to evict its ousted leadership.

headlines.title: Second Ebola treatment center set ablaze in eastern Congo
headlines.summary: A second Ebola treatment center was set on fire in eastern Congo, with 18 suspected cases fleeing; Red Cross volunteers have also died from suspected Ebola.

headlines.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
headlines.summary: A 39-year-old man was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland, Australia.
